evals.prompt: I have 5 images from Pinterest and Behance for my fintech startup. Can you extract a complete brand identity from them? I want the full design system with design tokens.
evals.expected_output: Agent loads brand-identity-extractor, guides user to provide images, runs meta-prompt, outputs 7-section brand identity package.

evals.prompt: Can you design a logo for my coffee shop? I like warm earthy colors and minimalist style.
evals.expected_output: Skill should not trigger alone. Agent may suggest running brand-identity-extractor as prerequisite before logo design.

evals.prompt: Our team needs to rebuild our web app's design system. We have screenshots of the current site, competitor references from Stripe and Linear, and some AI-generated mood boards. We want a complete brand identity we can hand off to the dev team — colors, typography, spacing tokens, everything. Also can you make sure it's accessible?
evals.expected_output: Agent loads brand-identity-extractor, processes images, meta-prompt handles full extraction including accessibility validation against design-standards reference.
